question.text: Under Rule 15(1) of SCRR, for how long must a member of a recognized stock exchange maintain and preserve the Register of Transactions (Sauda book)?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Rule 15(1) requires every member to maintain and preserve the books of account and documents listed under this sub-rule for 5 years. The Register of Transactions (Sauda book) is one of these. **The Trap:** 2 years is the preservation period for a different set of documents under Rule 15(2), not for the Sauda book. **Cross-Exam Context:** Record-keeping requirements are tested in NISM Series VIII and NISM Series III-B. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Know the distinction between 5-year documents (Rule 15(1)) and 2-year documents (Rule 15(2)).
